title: acrostephanus poggei
intro: Acrostephanus poggei is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the Pogge's or Pogge's umbellifer. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Acrostephanus poggei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from skin conditions and wounds. The herbal preparation of Acrostephanus poggei typically involves making tea from its roots or leaves, although the plant's uses and preparations may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
